reviews.review_description:
He tried to say " I'm charging for this now, because I worked very hard on this " 
Well, umm...There's free versions way better than this for free. Ummmm, no 🤣
It's a 4 bit, flat screen game. You can find a better one, without the whiny guy who made this.
SideQuest literally has a virtual arcade for free. This is laughable. ARCADE TIME CAPSULE is free, and you can put any game you want on it. Custom  lighting, carpet, and background music.
THIS DEVELOPER IS HARRASSING ME THROUGH SPAMMING ME IN MY EMAIL

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to post a comment. It's much appreciated.

If you're not a fan of retro games (including Vectrex), I can understand your disappointment.

For $1, you get 15 retro-style games with flawless gameplay and lots of fun!

I'm making a point of taking note of your comments for my next game, which will have a rather retro style—but it certainly won't be aimed solely at nostalgia fans. It's a really awesome new game. I hope or I will deserve few 1 stars.

Best regards,
NeoPunk

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to post a comment. It's much appreciated.

If you're not a fan of retro games (including Vectrex), I can understand your disappointment.

For $1, you get 15 retro-style games with flawless gameplay and lots of fun!

And it's free to try ! You can play the first levels of each game!

I'm making a point of taking note of your comments for my next game, which will have a rather retro style—but it certainly won't be aimed solely at nostalgia fans. It's a really awesome new game. I hope or I will deserve few 1 stars.

Best regards,
NeoPunk

reviews.review_description:
VR is a great way to experience these simple, fun games. Great use of the controllers and everything is very smooth and quick. I see myself playing this alot. This game is a better value than many of the paid games on the store. Great job from the dev team - looking forward to see how this develops.

[Update] Dec 6
Ok - the latest MR update is amazing! Everyone needs to experience this game. I turn the music and voice off and queue up my favourite album in the meta browser and get lost playing this. I would love a Geometry Wars 3 clone to emerge from this (insta-buy for this). Great work to the dev team. Thank you for this great app. There is no better value on the app store if you like this type of game.

[Update April 4]
I had an issue with unlocks for a previous bundle I purchased. This dev is very responsive to issues and helped me resolve my issue quickly. These games are alot of fun and well worth the unlock cost. More people need to try this great game. Looking forward to what's next.

reviews.review_description:
A great collection of classic retro-style video games. The pace is fast and the action is often reminiscent of the excellent modern arcade remake Space Invaders Frenzy... and yet somehow, it's also highly satisfying, almost meditative, when played on the Basic difficulty setting. Don't ask me how they pulled that off!

The graphics are color vector, one of my favorite arcade rarities - like the classic Tempest, although the actual games are different from Tempest.

developer_response.body:
Hello !

Thanks for the review ! I appreciate it a lot!

Like I said in my last release (v11), reviews give me the energy to continue developing Arcade and adding new games and features.

Currently I am working on my next game :-)

Cheers.

reviews.review_description:
Probably my favourite game. So immersive and addictive. I love the mixed reality option. A lot of fun to be had with this collection of games. 
I’ve bought full versions of 3 games so far and will likely buy more (or all).

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thanks for you review!

I hope you will have fun with the upcoming games this years : Bricks82 / Wire & Sentinel!

Cheers.

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely LOVE this game. It is quite simply one of the most addictive games I've ever played. It loads up almost instantaneously, which makes it perfect if you only have a few minutes to spare and just want a quick session. Invariably, I end up playing on an evening and can easily spend 2 - 3 hours on it. Sometimes longer.

Essentially, it's a selection of classic arcade games, such as Space Invaders, Galaxian, Asteroids, Breakout, Tetris, and more, all with a distinctive vector graphics VR style.

The replay value is off the charts, as I find myself coming back to this game regularly to keep trying to improve my high scores. 

Each game is split into 4 difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, and Expert. The harder levels are faster, and with many games having between 30 and 75 levels, it takes some real skill and perseverance to complete some of the games on Expert. You'll often find you've narrowly missed out on a high score by a narrow margin, so you'll find yourself having just "one more go"..!

One of my favourite mini games is Jigsaw, which has you rotating objects of varying shapes and sizes (and constantly changing colours) into position on a patterned board. With 30 levels to play through, it becomes quite frantic rotating the pieces and locking them into place before the timer runs out. Manipulating the individual pieces feels like you're moving objects around in a scene from Minority Report.

The graphics are crisp, colourful, and varied, and the collision detection is highly accurate.

The in-game music has a very ambient feel to it and is actually quite soothing. It's one of the few games that doesn't stress me out. I find it incredibly relaxing to play.

The inclusion of a mixed reality mode is invaluable, as it allows me to keep an eye on the time, without distracting me too much from the game.

The recent addition of a World Challenge, which is a year long score challenge, with monthly leaderboards to try and climb, is a stroke of a genius and adds even more replay value to the game - I'm currently 3rd in the world :)

The game's creator, NeoPunk, has done an amazing job putting this together and provides regular updates and improvements, as well as new game variants.

I've let a number of my friends play this on my Quest, and they all agree, it's incredibly addictive.

Give it a go, and you'll realise what a fantastic game it is.

Cheers,

elldeegee

developer_response.body:
Hi elldeegee!

Thank you for this very long review!
You've summed up the spirit of Arcade very well.

I can see that you're one of the most active players on Arcade :-)
Thanks again.

I'm currently working on the next 3 games:
- bricks 82 (arcade) -> 1st week of April
- sentinel (arcade) -> 1st week of June
- wire (puzzle) -> 1st week of September

Don't hesitate if you have any questions.

Cheers

reviews.review_description:
I grabbed this as a “hey, why not?” and was pleasantly surprised at the format and layout of this game.
It reminds me of a mix of the Vectrex console with the super-sized video game classics at a Dave and Busters.  I played a few games, just to try it out, but I was instantly impressed and got the add-on pack.  It’s a great deal, and I even enjoyed playing the Christmas matching game to the end.  (This isn’t typically a type of game I enjoy.)
I have played Vectrex emulated  games years ago, but I didn’t get the same feeling/nostalgia back then as this gave me today.  I’d recommend trying this.  It’s fun, why not?

reviews.review_description:
Hello, wanted to give this highly-addictive game a two-thumbs up for its simplicity and fun!!
Games are divided into 4 speeds for each one, giving you the ability to experience the games a little bit differently.  
My only suggestion is that there needs to be a set of instructions/explanations for each game (for example, in Rocs or Rocs Emoji, what is the value of hitting each different piece? Is there a way to score higher or is it just by finishing the level quicker? 

Thanks!!

developer_response.body:
Hello! 

Thanks for the review. I appreciate so much!

So to answer your question, there is a section for that: click the 'info' button. You will have the rules for each game. But I think for Roc I forgot to mention the bonus :-). My bad, I will correct this.

But I think I will change this (how to access rules) in the next release. The user should access the rule easily. I have an idea...

Stay tune for the really nice next release!

Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
Highly recommended!
I love playing these 'simple fun' arcade retro style games (2D). Just sit down and enjoy the happy synthesizer tunes and the relaxed to intense gameplay.
You move the controllers around to shift your object and will only use the trigger buttons to fire.
The developer mentioned on Reddit that more game are coming. Point of improvement would be that I feel the need to push the screen a bit further away or give the option make the view smaller. 
My current favorites are Galactics, Invasion and Rocks.

developer_response.body:
Hello!

Thanks for the nice review!
Galactics, Invasions and Rocks are good picks ;-)

I plan to make an Invasion II with new animated invaders (more like Galactics).

Also the push screen is something in the air (for few months). It will be part of a options per game refactoring :-)

Options per game refactoring is the possibility to have options per game (vol, fx, etc...) and in a near futur : music, distance, etc...

So the todo list is enormous.

Probably this feature is planned for late july or august.

Note: if you have suggestions, you can send them to contact@neopunk.xyz

Cheers

reviews.review_description: Let me start by saying, I'm in my upper 60's in age so I've been through gaming since the birth of pong. These three games are reminiscent of those good old days, and also a little like beat saber. It has all the old challenges with the immersed experience to boot. This is an early review so I'm just going to keep to the basics. It's fast, fun, and challenging. I can see myself giving this a lot of my free time. Looking at the menu, it hints of more games coming. Might be nice to have a menu addition, to select music to play during the game. Not sure if that would take away from the sound effects or not? Something for them to ponder I guess. All in all I highly recommend this game and look forward to good things to come. At the current price of $1.99 you should buy it and gift it to family and friends before it goes up. Well done developers!

developer_response.body:
Thanks you very much!
I plan many things to do (regarding the music too).
So 2024 should bring good stufs :-)

developer_response.body: Thanks for you review!

reviews.review_description:
I usually find that "retro/arcade"-style descriptions of VR games often translate to horribly-crafted low poly graphics, lazy audio and generally oversimplified aesthetics. While the presentation here is in fact simple, it's very intentional and uniquely stylized. The gameplay is fast and fun (admittedly, I've only tried bricks and blocks but can't wait to play the other games), the music is actually quite good, and there is a lot of functionality in the mechanics. Might as well pick this up! It's a great addition to any VR library.

l i n k t r . e e 
/
q u a c k b i r t h

reviews.review_description:
Someone recommended this game so I decided to try it out. I wondered how these retro style games would work in VR. Would you be sitting in front of a simulated arcade machine pushing simulated buttons? Nothing like that at all! The controls have been redone in a way that could only work with VR, and the result is AMAZING! Although the graphics are in the style of old school vector graphics, they are much smoother and richer than what would have been possible back in the days. The background music and sound effects are excellent and modern. Overall I think the game design is brilliant. You won’t regret buying this game! Do it now! It really is a lot of fun. 

My only complaint is that I am colorblind and I can’t see the difference between some of the colors in the Match game (yellow and green, white and cyan I think they are). If the developer could get a colorblind person to help with color selection to make these colors more distinguishable for colorblind people that would be great. Or maybe there could be a setting option to add dashed lines or some other feature to help distinguish the different colors.

Update: I didn’t notice the different themes for the Match game, yes they are great!

developer_response.body:
Hello thanks for the review I appreciate!

For the Match I understand. But did you try the 2 other themes (christmas & smiles) ? I know it's not the same, but it's based on form only (not on color).

Tell me!

Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
This is a really fun game for all ages. If you grew up going to the arcade this game is a must!  
Music is great to.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
Glad to hear that you enjoy Arcade.
Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Much better than expected. Very addicti.
reviews.review_description: This is really good, if anybody hasn’t tried it. Really impressive and some old school arcade games totally re-imagined with interesting controls that are extremely responsive.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for you review, I appreciate it.
Your review is interresting, For some very good point that could help some readers:
- "much better than expected" is a comment that comes up often. I think people should give a try 😀
- "the controls are extremely responsive". I will not propose any game that doesnot respect this. That's why, Maze is taking so much time to make.

Cheers

reviews.review_description: Really impressed with this. It successfully satiates a particular game genre I love: vector (line art) graphics retro arcade games.  It's by no means a straight port of  traditional arcade favourites, each game has clearly been designed from the ground up with the nature of motion controllers in mind, and they really all work very well.  Great for a bit of zoning out for a few minutes.  The default selection of games is pretty complete and in-app purchases are very reasonable, plus an option to donate to the author if you can afford it (as I have.)  The whole experience is very clean, tidy, and well finished, and even the download is tiny.  More games like this, please! 🕹️😁

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thanks for the review!
It's really much appreciated.

Next game to come : Maze, my interpretation of Pac Man!

reviews.review_description:
Growing up in the 80s this is the VR I was promised. Great relaxing game can be played sitting/relaxed. Brought me right back to being a kid. The retro graphics were awesome. My high score list for each of the three games is now filled with initials spelling out curse words just like the arcades of old.

Well worth the $2. Looking forward to additional content!

The simple graphics, the addictive gameplay, the cheesy 80’s tunes with that 80’s keyboard sounds.

Theirs only 3 games available right now, but I look forward to the others.

It’s great that you can just sit in your bed and play this, it’s actually very relaxing.

For the price, it’s worth adding this to your collection.

To answer you question, yes more games to come :-)

And I guaranty you a lot of fun :-)

The next one should be a variation of Blocks. Probably for August or september.
But definitely it should take less time to code.

Cheers,
NeoPunk
